mapper.sql: id, name, description, price, original_price, stock, category_id, category_name, image, images, sales, status, is_hot, is_new, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product
status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category_id IN ( SELECT id FROM product_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} OR parent_id = #{categoryId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, original_price, stock, category_id, category_name, image, status, is_hot, is_new) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{image}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{isNew})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, sales = sales - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock + #{quantity} >= 0
UPDATE product SET avg_rating = #{avgRating}, comment_count = #{commentCount} WHERE id = #{id}
